result.stdout:
USAGE:
    jerk.dll [searchPath] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [searchPath]    Path to search. Defaults to current working directory

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help              Prints help information
    -p, --pattern <GLOB>    The file glob to match 
    -o, --output <CSV>      The output file

OPTIONS:

    -o, --output <CSV>      The output file
